evidence: I'm a huge horror movie fan & no one can deny that these 4 are true classics.
I remember owning this as a young kid & watching it innumerable times every year around Christmas.
Overall, it was not fantastic, I understand why it was cancelled, it’s your average teen-drama high school show with nothing overly special to offer.
The movie itself is creepy & disturbing, it’s raw & feels quite real.
The performaces alone make at least one viewing worth your while.
The picture & sound quality is good, obviously not HD, but still good & fun to watch.
The quality is great, the sound, the picture, everything is awesome.
The DVDs: Good condition, ideally they'd be BluRay, however, that'd cost a lot more money.
I personally preferred the actors performances in the 1978 version, but again, that's just my opinion.
I love how all 4 DVDs fit in the 1 case, this saves a lot of room on my DVD shelf.
The DVD: Works great, the menu is straight forward & easy to use.
The quality is great, the sound, the picture, everything is awesome.
I love this movie, it's fantastic, I've watched it so many times I've lost count.
It's a good movie for most people & it has some good messages.

summary: The user enjoys a mix of horror, comedy, and family genres, with a strong preference for high-quality productions. They appreciate fast-paced narratives and emotionally resonant stories, often reflecting on their childhood favorites.
